# Account — sign in and shared links

## Sign in & account

**Explore sign-in view** (when an action needs auth inside Explore): Sign In / Create Account tabs, Google, forgot password, **Not now**.

**Play share gate overlay:** Same auth fields; subtitle mentions Community (see contradictions).

**Account settings:** email, export data, delete account, privacy links.

---

---

## Auth notes (internal spec summary)

Sign in is required to share patches and manage **Shared links**.
Entry points: Explore user menu, Play **Share…** gate overlay, or auth view inside Explore.

Supported methods: email/password login, create account, Google OAuth.
Tokens are stored in the OS keychain (macOS) or Credential Manager (Windows).

User menu when signed in: **Shared links**, **Account**, **Sign out**.

---

## Current State

Full auth stack is **built, wired, and visible** in the Hub UI:

| Layer | Files | Status |
|-------|-------|--------|
| UI (HTML/JS) | `Resources/hub/index.html` — auth, publish, vote, Google cancel | **Done** |
| C++ bridge | `Source/UI/Components/HubComponent.cpp` — all bindings | **Done** |
| Token storage | `HubSecureTokenStorage_*` + `AmorphSettings.h` | **Done** — Keychain (macOS) / Credential Manager (Windows); legacy XML token migrated on read |
| Backend API | Railway — `/api/auth/login`, `/register`, `/google`, `/google/poll/{state}` | **Live** |

Auth, publish, and vote UI are **not** hidden behind CSS in current builds.
